acceptance_criteria: AO supports at least two channel connectors with a consistent adapter contract and pluggable extension path.
Operators can subscribe specific event types (workflow checkpoints, run failures, task state changes) per connector.
Connector credentials/tokens are stored in scoped config with clear redaction in logs and JSON outputs.
Delivery failures include retry/backoff policy and observable dead-letter/error reporting.
Documentation includes setup, security posture, and operational troubleshooting for each supported connector.
description:
Operators should be able to route AO task/workflow/run events to messaging channels (for example Slack, Discord, Teams, Telegram) for faster response and remote awareness.

Implementation boundary: AO event routing and connector adapters with secure credential handling.
title: Add multi-channel notification connectors for workflow and run events
